# Wrangler

Cloudflare Workers CLI for deploying, developing, and managing Workers, KV, R2, D1, Vectorize, Hyperdrive, Workers AI, Containers, Queues, Workflows, Pipelines, and Secrets Store.

## Install

```sh
npx github:Elvis020/hey-skills add wrangler --to ./skills
```
